nodes.name: Henna-hooded foliage-gleaner
nodes.summary: Henna-hooded foliage-gleaner（Clibanornis erythrocephalus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Henna-hooded foliage-gleaner。

nodes.name: Henna-capped foliage-gleaner

nodes.name: Clibanornis
nodes.summary: Clibanornis（Clibanornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Henna-capped foliage-gleaner、Canebrake groundcreeper、Henna-hooded foliage-gleaner等5种鸟类。
